name: spin_deps_extdel
drl:
rule TJ1 salience 5 when $a : E0() from entry-point "S1" $b : E2($t : tag, this before[0ms,50ms] $a) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RN salience 9 when not D() P() then end
rule RL salience 1 when P() then end
_finding: D-175: the deps-carrying witness shape (insertLogical on TJ1 + not-D observer at salience 9). Oracle 3x: [TJ1, RN, TJ1, RL] — the belief drop lands EAGERLY at the delete's propagation, before any epoch-2 firing (the a7d cause split extends into the mark window). Pre-fix: SPINS (D-117 family). Post-fix: terminates but under-fires RN ([TJ1,TJ1,RL]) — the eager drop lands mid-pop-eval AFTER the pick committed to TJ1 (D-101/cf5x17 static return); Drools reopens the pick pre-fire. At landing this graduates to an OPEN_DIVERGENCE pin for that halt-fine-structure corner (D-106; needs its own arc — cf5x17 certifies the opposite polarity for the pre-drain shape).
